name: Poor Mans Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix hamburger, crackers, milk, onion, salt, and pepper. Press onto a cookie sheet (about 1-1/2 inches thick) and refrigerate overnight or at least 8 hours. Form into a nice rectangle before refrigerating.
2. Cut into serving size squares. Roll in flour and brown in hot oil or butter on both sides. Place into a baking dish and cover with mushroom sauce.
3. Add 1/2 cup water around the sides of the baking dish. Bake at 350 degrees for 1-1/2 to 2 hours, covering the dish while baking.
4. To make mushroom sauce: Simmer mushrooms in 2 tablespoons butter and 2 tablespoons water until tender and slightly browned. Set aside. Add butter to a small skillet on low heat. Add flour. Stir until butter melts completely and mixture bubbles nicely. Add milk all at once, bringing to boil while stirring constantly. Add the mushroom mixture (do not discard liquid). Simmer slowly until thickened.
